techniques.name: Spherification
techniques.description: Creating semi-solid spheres with thin membranes using sodium alginate and calcium lactate.

techniques.name: Foaming
techniques.description: Turning liquids into stable airy foams using soy lecithin or specialized siphons.

techniques.name: Gelification
techniques.description: Turning liquids into gels of various densities using agar-agar or gelatin.

techniques.name: Flash Freezing
techniques.description: Instant freezing using liquid nitrogen to create smooth textures or frozen shells.
